items.title: Quantum Measurement Notes
items.description: A growing set of clean notes on weak measurement, von Neumann measurement, and the ideas behind weak-value amplification.

items.title: Spin-Direction Coupling in Plasmonic Crystals
items.description: Numerical and conceptual work on spin-direction coupling, plasmonic crystals, and the interpretation of the optical response.

items.title: Quantum Eraser Study
items.description: A theoretical project exploring the delayed-choice quantum eraser and how information changes the interpretation of interference.

items.title: Weak Measurement Follow-up
items.description: Follow-up work focused on weak-value amplification, the role of postselection, and the limits of the approximation used in weak measurement.

items.title: Mathematical Methods for Physics
items.description: A structured collection of derivations and short notes that support my core physics preparation and later research reading.
